tools.name: sentry-list-organizations
tools.description: List all organizations the authenticated user has access to

tools.name: sentry-list-projects
tools.description: List all projects in an organization

organization.description: Organization slug (e.g., 'my-org'). Optional if configured in credentials.

tools.name: sentry-list-issues
tools.description: List issues (errors/problems) for a project. Can filter by status and query.

organization.description: Organization slug. Optional if configured in credentials.

project.description: Project slug (optional, lists all if not provided)

limit.description: Maximum number of issues to return (default: 25)

tools.name: sentry-get-issue
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific issue

tools.name: sentry-list-events
tools.description: List events (individual error occurrences) for an issue

issueId.description: The issue ID to get events for

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return (default: 25)

tools.name: sentry-get-event
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific event including full stack trace

organization.description: Organization slug. Optional if configured in credentials.
